title: Package and launch Change Observatory from the installed plugin
acceptance: agentic-sdlc observe --root <project> starts on loopback, selects an available port, opens the browser by default, and supports --no-open.
All observatory runtime and UI files are included in npm/plugin package contents and work from an installed package path.
Launcher shutdown, Host validation, CSP headers, MIME types, and package smoke behavior are tested.
README, plugin prompts, architecture, and Agentic SDLC skill instructions explain how to launch and record evidence-rich traces.
